lastUpdates.message: feat: add right panel map overview with linked route focus

fix: preserve scroll position when hero overview compacts

fix: support overnight lodge end-time selection beyond 23h
fix: tighten hero compact spacing and sidebar sticky layers
fix: simplify overnight lodge end-time mechanics
fix: allow overnight lodge end wheel to wrap before start
fix: remove remaining MoreHorizontal icon references
fix: restore MoreHorizontal import for panel menus
tune: split hero quick actions and move route recalc
fix: use absolute day timeline for post-lodge buffer calculation
fix: apply next-day checkout only to stay lodge segments
fix: recalculate timeline continuously across day boundaries
fix: restore compact hero bar tap target
feat: add compact hero alert chip and tap expand
tune: hide compact budget playbar before hero expands
tune: compact budget playbar fades in place on border
tune: fade in compact budget playbar with delayed dissolve
fix: fully remove hidden compact overview card remnants
tune: move compact budget usage into hero playbar
tune: collapse compact overview budget into playbar
tune: switch compact budget to glass style
tune: redesign compact budget overview
fix: include lodge segment totals in budget without double counting parent stays
tune: unify ferry receipt panel and sidebar sticky layout
tune: tighten overview spacing and pin library filters
tune: move hero actions to floating menu and refine overview compact
